stories.story: As a patient, I want to log in or register for the Clinic Appointment System patient dashboard so that I can request an administrative appointment.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Valid demo login or successful patient registration redirects to the patient dashboard.

stories.story: As a doctor, I want my account to be linked to one doctor profile so that I only see appointment requests assigned to me.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Doctor list/detail/review/audit/day-board APIs return only appointments and slots for the linked doctor_id.

stories.story: As a doctor, I want to update my department, room, focus, shift, capacity, and profile note so that patient booking uses current information.
stories.acceptance_criteria: PATCH /api/doctors/me updates the doctor profile and GET /api/doctors reflects the changed information.

stories.story: As an admin, I want to create doctor accounts and matching doctor profiles so that new doctors appear in patient booking and admin management.
stories.acceptance_criteria: POST /api/admin/doctors creates a doctor user/profile and the new doctor appears in GET /api/doctors and GET /api/admin/doctors.

stories.story: As a patient, I want to choose a future weekday, fictional doctor, and available slot so that the request matches the configured clinic schedule.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Doctor roster and availability endpoints return configured doctors, shifts, rooms, capacity, and slot status.

stories.story: As a marker, I want one notebook to regenerate code, website, image assets, SDLC artefacts, tests, CI/CD, Docker, and deployment files so that generation is verifiable.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Running the Task 1 notebook recreates Task 2 and the validation script passes.
